title: Shri Surya Dev Ki Aarti
intro: Read Shri Surya Dev Ki Aarti in Hindi and seek the divine blessings of Lord Surya Dev.
description:
Om Jai Surya Bhagwan,
Jai ho Dinkar Bhagwan.
Jagat ke netraswarupa,
Tum ho trigun swarupa.
Dharat sab hi tav dhyan,
Om Jai Surya Bhagwan॥
॥ Om Jai Surya Bhagwan ॥

Sarathi Arun hain Prabhu tum,
Shwet kamaldhari.
Tum char bhujadhari.
Ashwa hain saat tumhare,
Koti kiran pasare.
Tum ho dev mahan॥
॥ Om Jai Surya Bhagwan ॥

Ushakaal mein jab tum,
Udayachal aate.
Sab tab darshan paate.
Phailate ujiyara,
Jagta tab jag saara.
Kare sab tab gungaan॥
॥ Om Jai Surya Bhagwan ॥

Sandhya mein Bhuvneshwar astachal jaate.
Godhan tab ghar aate.
Godhuli bela mein,
Har ghar har aangan mein.
Ho tav mahima gaan॥
॥ Om Jai Surya Bhagwan ॥

Dev-danuj nar-nari,
Rishi-munivar bhajte.
Aditya hriday japte.
Stotra ye mangalkari,
Iski hai rachna nyari.
De nav jeevandan॥
॥ Om Jai Surya Bhagwan ॥

Tum ho trikaal rachayita,
Tum jag ke aadhar.
Mahima tav aparmpaar.
Pranon ka sinchan karke,
Bhakton ko apne dete.
Bal, buddhi aur gyaan॥
॥ Om Jai Surya Bhagwan ॥

Bhuchar jalchar khechar,
Sabke hon pran tumhi.
Sab jeevon ke pran tumhi.
Ved-puran bakhane,
Dharm sabhi tumhe mane.
Tum hi sarvshaktimaan॥
॥ Om Jai Surya Bhagwan ॥

Pujan kartin dishayein,
Puje dash dikpal.
Tum bhuvanon ke pratipal.
Rituyein tumhari daasi,
Tum shashwat avinashi.
Shubhkari Anshuman॥
॥ Om Jai Surya Bhagwan ॥

faq.q1: What is the main significance of performing Shri Surya Dev's Aarti?
faq.a1: It is performed to seek physical health, vitality, radiance, honor, and success in life.
faq.q2: Which is the most auspicious day for worshipping Surya Dev?
faq.a2: Sunday is considered the most auspicious day for worshipping the Sun God.
faq.q3: What offerings are preferred for Surya Dev during Aarti?
faq.a3: He is fond of water (Arghya), red flowers, jaggery, wheat, and vermilion (Roli).
faq.q4: Can Shri Surya Dev's Aarti be performed at home?
faq.a4: Yes, you can offer water and perform the Aarti with devotion from your balcony or terrace at sunrise.
faq.q5: Which mantra is most effective to chant after the Aarti?
faq.a5: Chanting the mantra 'Om Suryaya Namah' or 'Om Ghrini Suryaya Namah' after the Aarti is considered highly beneficial.
